name: Create Accommodation Exam Variant
description: Create an exam variant named 'Introduction to Psychology (Accommodations)' on the SEB Server (http://localhost:8080, credentials: super-admin / admin). The new exam must match the start and end times of the existing 'Introduction to Psychology' exam, use the 'Accessibility_Profile_v2' configuration, and have the connection password set to 'AccommodateMe!'.
